overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a futuristic cyberpunk city, beginning in a covered walkway with illuminated pillars, transitioning to a sunlit plaza featuring a giant holographic koi fish, and ending at a commercial building entrance with digital billboards. The footage is clearly from a high-end game engine (Cyberpunk 2077) with ray-traced lighting and detailed futuristic architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway beneath elevated highway or building

events.description: pedestrian in dark clothing passes close to camera on the left side
exiting the dark covered walkway into bright sunlight of the open plaza

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the covered walkway beneath concrete pillars, approaching the bright exit ahead

notable_agents.action: walking toward camera then passing by closely on the left

entered.detail: tall rectangular structural pillars with bright white-green vertical illumination
massive cylindrical concrete columns supporting the overhead roadway structure
yellow textured safety strips embedded in the walkway floor
smooth dark concrete walls lining the left side of the pedestrian path

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a dimly lit covered walkway beneath an urban overpass, characterized by regularly spaced illuminated pillars casting greenish light. The camera moves forward along a concrete path marked with yellow tactile strips, passing occasional pedestrians walking in the opposite direction. The environment is enclosed with limited visibility of the surroundings, creating a corridor-like atmosphere that ends with a bright exit into daylight.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban plaza with palm trees and holographic advertising displays

events.description: dramatic shift from artificial lighting to bright natural sunlight with long shadows
giant holographic koi fish materializes and swims across the building facade on the right

agents.ego_description: walking across the sunlit plaza, turning slightly right to approach the holographic displays and futuristic architecture

entered.detail: tall palm trees casting long morning shadows across the plaza pavement
towering modern buildings with glass facades and geometric architectural details
massive three-dimensional holographic projection of orange and white koi fish swimming in mid-air
modern architectural ramp or building with distinctive yellow and black striped pattern
short square concrete posts arranged along the plaza walkways

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the underpass, the scene opens into a vast sunlit urban plaza surrounded by futuristic skyscrapers. Tall palm trees dot the landscape, casting long morning shadows across the paved ground. A striking holographic display of giant koi fish swims across the facade of a building to the right, while the camera continues walking toward a commercial building entrance ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial building entrance with digital advertising and neon signage

events.description: entering the shadow of the commercial building with increasing artificial neon illumination
passing through the building entrance into a covered commercial walkway with bright digital displays

agents.ego_description: approaching and entering the commercial building entrance, following other pedestrians into the covered walkway with digital billboards

notable_agents.action: person in green pants walking ahead toward the building entrance

entered.detail: large illuminated advertising screens displaying colorful product commercials and brand imagery
grand entrance to commercial complex with glass doors and overhead digital canopy
bright neon signs and illuminated corporate logos on the building facade

segments.scene_description: The final segment approaches a massive commercial building entrance, transitioning from open plaza to a covered walkway. The environment shifts from natural sunlight to artificial lighting as digital billboards and neon advertisements dominate the visual field. The camera follows other pedestrians into the entrance, passing concrete bollards and illuminated advertising displays that line the walls of the commercial corridor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a dimly lit urban underpass into a bright, futuristic plaza before concluding at a neon-lit commercial entrance. It begins in a corridor-like covered walkway, moving past illuminated greenish pillars and tactile strips beneath an overpass. As the camera emerges from the enclosure, the scene opens into a vast sunlit plaza where long shadows fall across the pavement and a giant holographic koi fish swims across a nearby skyscraper. The movement then carries forward through the open space and past palm trees, shifting from natural morning light back into artificial illumination as the camera approaches a massive building. Finally, the view transitions into a covered commercial corridor dominated by glowing digital billboards and neon advertisements as it follows pedestrians toward the entrance.
